signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge to $41.64M (Week Ending April 16)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][6]

U.S. spot XRP ETFs saw $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16, the largest single-week inflow in three months and a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million, fueling a 12.5% price surge from April lows to around $1.44[1][6]. This marks consistent daily demand ($11.87M, $17.11M, $11.20
